def train_model(model, dataset, optimizer):
    # Violation: manually indexing a dataset in a training loop instead of using a DataLoader
    for i in range(len(dataset)):
        inputs, labels = dataset[i]
        optimizer.zero_grad()
        outputs = model(inputs.unsqueeze(0))
        loss = criterion(outputs, labels.unsqueeze(0))
        loss.backward()
        optimizer.step()
